summary: Tested Kwitanties (Receipts) tab bug fixes. All 3 bugs verified fixed: 1) Receipt shows correct outstanding amounts stored at time of payment, 2) Openstaand column uses stored remaining values (new payments show SRD amounts, old payments show '-'), 3) Print button opens backend HTML receipt in new tab instead of CSS print hack.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kwitanties bug fixes verified. New payments (KW2026-00100, KW2026-00101) have stored remaining_rent, remaining_service, remaining_fines, remaining_internet fields. Old payments have null values and show '-' in UI. Print button opens /api/kiosk/admin/payments/{id}/receipt?token=xxx in new tab.

backend_api_tests.result: PASS - Returns payments with remaining fields
PASS - Response includes remaining_rent, remaining_service, remaining_fines, remaining_internet
PASS - Single payment has remaining fields
PASS - HTML contains 'Openstaand na betaling' section
PASS - Old payments have null remaining values

frontend_ui_tests.result: PASS - Tab loads with payments table

frontend_ui_tests.test: Old payments (KW2026-00099 and older) show '-' in Openstaand
Click receipt view icon opens modal
Receipt modal shows 'Openstaand na betaling' section
Afdrukken button opens backend HTML in new tab

bug_1.description: Receipt showed incorrect outstanding amounts (was using current tenant balance instead of balance at time of payment)
bug_1.fix: Backend now stores remaining_rent/service/fines/internet in payment document via update_one after insert

bug_2.fix: Frontend Openstaand column uses stored payment.remaining_* fields instead of current tenant balance

bug_3.fix: Print now opens window.open() to backend /admin/payments/{id}/receipt?token=xxx instead of CSS print hack
